steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The problem gives a conversion rate: 3 teaspoons = 1 tablespoon. To convert from tablespoons to teaspoons, multiply by 3.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: The computed value is $132$, so the matching answer is $132$.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content: No other choice matches: 47 = 44 + 3 (wrong operation), 88 = 44 × 2 (wrong multiplier), 176 = 44 × 4 (wrong multiplier). Only 132 is correct.

choices.explanation: • 47 = 44 + 3, which adds the conversion factor instead of multiplying. This is not the correct operation for unit conversion. This is incorrect.
• 88 = 44 × 2. There is no basis for multiplying by 2; the conversion factor is 3 teaspoons per tablespoon. This is incorrect.
• 176 = 44 × 4. There is no basis for multiplying by 4. This is incorrect.
